pi_items.source: Explicitly required in the task description ('She completed 42 dives before using Subsurface... start from number 43') and validated by the evaluation script.
setup_task.sh copies the official Subsurface sample dive data to this path, and export_result.sh uses this path to evaluate the task.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf logbook. The target file is set to '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf'. The goal to renumber all dives sequentially starting from number 43 is derived directly from the task scenario (42 prior dives) and is validated by the post-task export script.
